rule_metadata.name: SUSP_EXPL_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_1
rule_metadata.description: Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0050, authentication bypass through QCommand argument injection
rule_metadata.author: X__Junior

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_EXPL_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_1
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0050, authentication bypass through QCommand argument injection"
		reference = "https://labs.watchtowr.com/guess-who-would-be-stupid-enough-to-rob-the-same-vault-twice-pre-auth-rce-chains-in-commvault/"
		author = "X__Junior"
		date = "2025-08-21"
		score = 60

	strings:
		$sa1 = "_localadmin__"
		$sa2 = "-localadmin"

	condition:
		not uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filesize < 20MB and all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_EXPL_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_2
rule_metadata.description: Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0050, authentication bypass through QCommand argument injection
rule_metadata.author: X__Junior

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_EXPL_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_2
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0050, authentication bypass through QCommand argument injection"
		reference = "https://labs.watchtowr.com/guess-who-would-be-stupid-enough-to-rob-the-same-vault-twice-pre-auth-rce-chains-in-commvault/"
		author = "X__Junior"
		date = "2025-08-21"
		score = 65

	strings:
		$sa1 = "_localadmin__"
		$sa2 = "-localadmin" base64

	condition:
		filesize < 20MB and all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: SUSP_EXPL_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Artifact_Aug25
rule_metadata.description: Detects exploit artifact for WT-2025-0050, authentication bypass through QCommand argument injection
rule_metadata.author: X__Junior

rules.rule_text:
rule SUSP_EXPL_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Artifact_Aug25
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects exploit artifact for WT-2025-0050, authentication bypass through QCommand argument injection"
		reference = "https://labs.watchtowr.com/guess-who-would-be-stupid-enough-to-rob-the-same-vault-twice-pre-auth-rce-chains-in-commvault/"
		author = "X__Junior"
		date = "2025-08-21"
		score = 75

	strings:
		$sa1 = "_localadmin__"
		$sa2 = /-cs [a-zA-Z0-9-{}]{3,32} -cs /
		$sb2 = "-localadmin" base64
		$sb1 = "-localadmin"

	condition:
		filesize < 20MB and all of ( $sa* ) and 1 of ( $sb* )
}

rule_metadata.name: EXPL_JSP_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_1
rule_metadata.description: Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0049, Post-Auth RCE with QCommand Path Traversal
rule_metadata.author: X__Junior

rules.rule_text:
rule EXPL_JSP_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_1
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0049, Post-Auth RCE with QCommand Path Traversal"
		author = "X__Junior"
		date = "2025-08-21"
		reference = "https://labs.watchtowr.com/guess-who-would-be-stupid-enough-to-rob-the-same-vault-twice-pre-auth-rce-chains-in-commvault/"
		score = 75

	strings:
		$s1 = "<App_GetUserPropertiesResponse>" ascii
		$s2 = "getMethod('getRuntime').invoke(null).exec(param.cmd)" ascii

	condition:
		filesize < 50KB and all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: EXPL_JSP_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_2
rule_metadata.description: Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0049, Post-Auth RCE with QCommand Path Traversal
rule_metadata.author: X__Junior

rules.rule_text:
rule EXPL_JSP_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Aug25_2
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects potential exploit for WT-2025-0049, Post-Auth RCE with QCommand Path Traversal"
		author = "X__Junior"
		date = "2025-08-21"
		reference = "https://labs.watchtowr.com/guess-who-would-be-stupid-enough-to-rob-the-same-vault-twice-pre-auth-rce-chains-in-commvault/"
		score = 75

	strings:
		$s1 = "<App_UpdateUserPropertiesRequest>" ascii
		$s2 = "<description>" ascii
		$s3 = "getMethod('getRuntime').invoke(null).exec(param.cmd)" ascii

	condition:
		filesize < 50KB and all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: EXPL_LOG_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Indicator_Shell_Drop_Aug25
rule_metadata.description: Detects suspicious log lines that indicate web shell drops into the Apache root folder of a Commvault installation
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule EXPL_LOG_CommVault_CVE_2025_57791_Indicator_Shell_Drop_Aug25
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects suspicious log lines that indicate web shell drops into the Apache root folder of a Commvault installation"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://labs.watchtowr.com/guess-who-would-be-stupid-enough-to-rob-the-same-vault-twice-pre-auth-rce-chains-in-commvault/"
		date = "2025-08-21"
		score = 70

	strings:
		$xr1 = /Results written to \[[C-Z]:\\Program Files\\Commvault\\ContentStore\\Apache\\webapps\\ROOT\\[^\\]{1,20}\.jsp\]/

	condition:
		$xr1
}
